prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约6761名，2023年约4894名（大幅前移），2024年约5444名（小幅后移），2025年物理类约6688名（显著后移）。近三年呈\"前移-后移-再 后移\"的波动走势，2025年基准约6688名，较2024年后移约1244名，反映竞争格局变化；该校在四川省理科/物理类计划：2022年114人，2023年113人，2024年1 16人，2025年121人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划135人，较2025年增加14人（扩幅约11.6%），扩招有利于缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双 一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第15名（2025年第16名、2024年第13名），稳居全国前20，层次极高，对考生有持续吸引力；2021年声誉偏负面（保安 打狗事件），2023年偏负面（马院负责人不雅图片事件），但2026年声誉数据中未提及东南大学，说明近期无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第31位（较热），短视频曝光量中等， 报考关注度平稳。未见明显投档断档记录；拥有5个A+学科（交通运输工程、土木工程、建筑学、生物医学工程、电子科学与技术），A-及以上共18个学科，数 量居全国前列；电子、信息、计算机等优势学科与当前社会高热专业高度契合，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、计算机类、电气工程等专业在202 6年持续高热推荐，与东南大学优势学科高度匹配，推升报考热度；四川省2026年物理类考生估算约32.5万人（较2025年28.5万增长约14%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；东南大学位于江苏南京（长三角核心城市），对西南地区考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在四川省招生人数占全国总计划比例约2%-4% ，属中等偏下水平，非本地生源依赖型。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次6688名、2026年扩招约11.6%（缓解竞争）、四川省物理类考生增长约14%（加剧竞争）、优势学科 与热门专业高度契合（推升热度）等因素，扩招与考生增长相互对冲后竞争略加剧；预测2026年理科最低位次约7200名，区间6700-7700名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（吴健雄班）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、人工智能、软件工程、网络空间安全）
- 电子信息类（含信息工程、电子科学与技术、海洋信息工程）
- 未来机器人（未来技术班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（智能制造与智能系统）
- 工科试验班（智慧能源与电气工程）
- 建筑类（含建筑学、城乡规划、风景园林）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化培养）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（智慧建造与智能交通）
- 生物医学工程类（含生物医学工程、智能医学工程等）
- 预防医学
- 理科试验班（含数学、统计学、物理学等）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间6700-7700名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（智能制造、智慧能源、建筑类），一档专业（吴健雄班、计算机类、电子信息类）作为冲刺，三档专业（智慧建造 、生物医学工程类）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（6700名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（7700名左右）应以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 6761, in 2023 approximately 4894 (significant forward shift), in 2024 approximately 5444 (slight backward shift), and in 2025 for physics category approximately 6688 (significant backward shift). The past three years show a fluctuation trend of "forward shift - backward shift - further backward shift". The baseline for 2025 is approximately 6688, a backward shift of about 1244 compared to 2024, reflecting changes in the competitive landscape. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan for science/physics category: 114 in 2022, 113 in 2023, 116 in 2024, 121 in 2025, showing a gradual small-scale expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 135, an increase of 14 from 2025 (expansion rate of about 11.6%), which helps alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Ranked 15th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (16th in 2025, 13th in 2024), consistently among the top 20 nationwide, with a very high level and sustained appeal to candidates. In 2021, reputation was somewhat negative (security guard beating dog incident), in 2023 somewhat negative (indecent image incident involving a person in charge of the School of Marxism), but in 2026 reputation data does not mention Southeast University, indicating no major negative public opinion recently. Douyin popularity ranking 31st (relatively hot), short video exposure moderate, application attention stable. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Has 5 A+ disciplines (Transportation Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology), and a total of 18 disciplines rated A- or above, ranking among the top in the country. Advantageous disciplines such as Electronics, Information, and Computer Science are highly aligned with current socially hot majors, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Computer Science, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended in 2026, highly matching Southeast University's advantageous disciplines, boosting application enthusiasm. The estimated number of physics category candidates in Sichuan in 2026 is about 325,000 (an increase of about 14% from 285,000 in 2025), with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying competition. Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu (core city of the Yangtze River Delta), which has strong cross-provincial appeal to candidates from the southwestern region. The university's enrollment in Sichuan accounts for about 2%-4% of its total national plan, at a medium-low level, not heavily dependent on local students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 6688, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 11.6% (alleviating competition), the increase in Sichuan physics category candidates by about 14% (intensifying competition), and the high alignment of advantageous disciplines with popular majors (boosting enthusiasm), the expansion and candidate growth offset each other, resulting in slightly intensified competition. The predicted minimum ranking for science in 2026 is approximately 7200, with a range of 6700-7700.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Wu Jianxiong Class)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, Cyberspace Security)
- Electronic Information (including Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Marine Information Engineering)
- Future Robotics (Future Technology Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Systems)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Electrical Engineering)
- Architecture (including Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Training)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Construction and Intelligent Transportation)
- Biomedical Engineering (including Biomedical Engineering, Intelligent Medical Engineering, etc.)
- Preventive Medicine
- Science Experimental Class (including Mathematics, Statistics, Physics, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 6700-7700, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Intelligent Manufacturing, Smart Energy, Architecture) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Wu Jianxiong Class, Computer Science, Electronic Information) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Smart Construction, Biomedical Engineering) as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 6700), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 7700), mainly choose Tier 3 majors supplemented by Tier 2.
